title: Discover the new Enterprise features for SonarCloud
markdown:
# SonarCloud Enterprise: New Features for Enterprise-Scale Code Quality Management

## Introduction to SonarCloud Enterprise

SonarCloud, Sonar's Software-as-a-Service solution for clean code, has introduced a new Enterprise plan designed to address the needs of large-scale organizations. During a recent webinar presented by product managers Martin and John, Sonar unveiled comprehensive features that enable enterprises to manage code quality across multiple organizations and development platforms. SonarCloud identifies code issues through static code analysis while providing a methodology to help teams resolve those issues and improve their codebases over time. The platform examines source code through multiple quality lenses including reliability, maintainability, and security, with plans to expand to accessibility and performance analysis in the future.

## Core Value Propositions and Language Support

SonarCloud's fundamental appeal lies in its ease of deployment, scalability, and seamless integration with major DevOps platforms including GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Azure DevOps. The platform requires no infrastructure investment or administrative overhead from users, as Sonar manages all hosting and infrastructure. Organizations benefit from continuous product improvements and analysis enhancements without experiencing downtime or upgrade disruptions. Beyond the 28 programming languages supported in the base SonarCloud offering, the Enterprise plan extends support to specialized enterprise languages such as ABAP, Apex, COBOL, JCL, PL/I, and RPG. Enterprise subscriptions include commercial support, with optional premium support packages available for organizations with advanced requirements.

## Enterprise Organization Management and Single Sign-On

The new Enterprise plan introduces an overarching Enterprise space that consolidates management of multiple organizations across different DevOps platforms. Since each SonarCloud organization corresponds directly to an organization on DevOps platforms (or groups in GitLab), enterprises can now manage GitHub, Azure DevOps, and other platform organizations in a single location. Adding and removing organizations is simplified through an intuitive interface, allowing enterprises to scale their SonarCloud usage flexibly. A significant security enhancement comes through SAML-based single sign-on functionality, which enables organizations to authenticate directly through their own identity providers rather than relying solely on DevOps platform authentication. This integration strengthens security posture and streamlines access management for enterprise users.

## Portfolios and Management Reporting

The Enterprise plan includes advanced portfolio and management reporting capabilities, allowing organizations to gain comprehensive visibility across their entire codebase landscape. These features enable executive and technical leadership to track code quality metrics at scale, monitor trends across multiple teams and projects, and make data-driven decisions about development practices and quality initiatives. Portfolio management allows enterprises to group projects logically and view aggregated quality metrics, supporting governance requirements and strategic code quality planning across large organizations.

## Roadmap and Continuous Improvement

Sonar demonstrates commitment to ongoing enhancement of the SonarCloud Enterprise offering, with planned improvements throughout the remainder of the year and into 2025. The roadmap reflects responsiveness to enterprise customer needs while building upon the platform's existing strengths in code analysis and quality management. Enterprise customers can expect continued expansion of language support, additional security features, and enhanced management capabilities as the product evolves.

## Key Takeaways

- **Enterprise Organization Management**: SonarCloud Enterprise provides a unified space to manage multiple organizations across different DevOps platforms (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps) with simplified onboarding and administration
- **Enhanced Security with SAML Authentication**: Single sign-on capabilities through SAML enable direct integration with enterprise identity providers, strengthening security and access management
- **Extended Language Support**: Enterprise plans include support for specialized languages (ABAP, Apex, COBOL, JCL, PL/I, RPG) beyond the base 28-language offering
- **Portfolio and Reporting Capabilities**: Advanced management reporting and portfolio features provide enterprise-wide visibility into code quality metrics and trends across teams and projects
- **Fully Managed Infrastructure**: No infrastructure investment or administrative overhead required; Sonar manages all hosting, scaling, and continuous improvements with guaranteed high availability
